bull.b: A granted manufacturing patent extending protection into 2044 secures pelareorep's scalable production know-how, strengthening commercialization readiness and raising barriers to competitor copycats. Durable manufacturing IP improves partner confidence and supports long-term supply chain and launch planning.

Strong REO 022 results in KRAS-mutant MSS metastatic colorectal cancer—markedly longer duration of response and higher ORR versus historical SOC—provide substantive clinical differentiation. Durable efficacy in a high-need population bolsters registrational potential, commercial relevance, and partner interest over the

FDA alignment on a pivotal trial design for anal carcinoma creates a clearer regulatory path, reducing execution uncertainty. A defined single-study approach for accelerated and full approval raises the probability of an efficient development timeline and strengthens the case for downstream commercialization and licens

bear.b: With no product revenue and substantial recurring net losses, Oncolytics lacks an operating cash base to fund development. This structural lack of commercialization income forces ongoing reliance on external capital, increasing long-term dilution risk and constraining reinvestment flexibility absent a successful partne

Sustained negative operating and free cash flow signals ongoing cash burn to support trials and R&D. Despite some improvement versus prior years, continued outflows mean the company must raise capital periodically, which can dilute shareholders and limit the firm's ability to fund parallel development programs or scale

Equity turning negative alongside materially lower total assets reduces financial cushioning and borrowing capacity.
